menu.title: Main menu:
menu.changeLanguagePickGroup: Pick a community first (use “Switch group”) to change the language for that community.
menu.changeLanguageFailed: Could not open the language picker. Please try again.
menu.actionOnlyInGroup: This action is only available in a group.
menu.openDmAndStart: Open a private chat with the bot and tap /start.

groupWelcome.ready:
Welcome!

Tap “{chatBot}” to use the menu in a private chat with the bot.
groupWelcome.notReady:
Welcome!

The venue is not set up yet. Admin: run /setup.

group.botAddedIntro:
Hello! All menu actions happen in a private chat with the bot.

Admin: run /setup in this group (next steps in DM).
group.startInGroupHint: The bot menu is available in private messages. Tap “{chatBot}” and open a private chat with me.
group.botNeedsAdmin: For full setup and moderation flows, grant this bot administrator rights in the group.
group.setupAdminOnly: Only an administrator can configure the venue.
group.setupDmOpenFailed: I could not message you in private. Open a chat with the bot, tap Start, then run /setup in the group again or tap “Settings”.

book.pickNumberFromList: Pick a number from the list.
book.noMatchingDuration: No matching duration right now. Choose another day.
book.askLookingForPartners: Looking for partners for this booking?
book.noResourcesAskAdmin: No bookable venues. Ask an admin to run /setup.
book.myBookingsEmpty: No unfinished bookings in this chat.
book.myBookingsIntro: Your unfinished bookings — tap a row with date and time to cancel:
book.freeSlotsEmpty: No one is looking for partners for upcoming games in this group right now.
book.freeSlotsIntro: Player search — tap a row to join the game (the list will refresh):
book.platformNotConfigured: The platform is not set up or there are no active venues. Admin: /setup.
book.venueNotConfigured: Venue is not set up or there are no active courts. Admin: /setup.
book.groupNotConfigured: This group is not set up yet. Admin: /setup in the group.
book.slotTaken: This slot was just taken. Pick another time.
book.bookingWindowClosed: Outside the booking window for participants. Try later or contact an admin.
book.dailyLimitExceeded: Daily booking limit exceeded in this group. Pick another day or shorten the duration.
book.noDurationForThisSlot: No matching duration for this start time. Pick another day.
book.timeSlotInPastPickDay: This time has already passed. Pick another day.
book.listCancelNotFound: Booking was not found or is already cancelled.
book.askPlayersCount: How many people are you looking for? Enter a whole number from 1 to 50.
book.playersCountInvalid: Enter a whole number from 1 to 50.
book.createBookingFailed: Could not create the booking. Please try again.
book.cancelDmIntroAdmin: Booking cancelled by a group admin.

msg.noSlotsBookingWindow: Booking is not available right now.

rules.welcomeIntro:
Welcome! Please read the community rules before you start.

After reading, tap the accept button below the last message.

—
rules.openBotForRules: To read and confirm the rules, open the bot in a private chat and tap Start.
rules.languagePickerIntro: Choose your preferred language / Оберіть бажану мову:
rules.chooseLanguageInDm: Оберіть мову в приватному повідомленні від бота / Choose language in the bot DM.
rules.rulesSentToDmPing: Community rules were sent to you in a private message from the bot. Open the chat with the bot (tap Start if needed) and confirm using the button below.
rules.acceptConfirmOnlyForMember: You can confirm the rules only for a group you are currently a member of.
rules.welcomeAfterAcceptReady: ✅ Rules accepted. Open the bot in a private chat and tap /start.
rules.welcomeAfterAcceptNotReady: ✅ Rules accepted. The venue is not set up yet. Admin: run /setup.
rules.groupRulesNotFound: Rules for this group were not found.
rules.sendRulesFailedRetry: Could not send the rules. Try again or tap “{chatBot}” in the group.

callbacks.wrongUser: This button is not for you.
callbacks.notGroupMember: You are not a member of this group.
callbacks.groupOrMemberUnavailable: The group is unavailable or you are not in it.
callbacks.groupNotResolved: Could not determine the group. Ask to send the rules again.
callbacks.rulesAcceptFailed: Could not confirm: rules are not defined or you are not in the chat member list.

onboarding.needLanguageRulesDm: First choose your language and accept the community rules in the bot chat (buttons were sent in DM or in the group).
onboarding.needLanguageRulesGroup: First choose your language and accept the community rules (buttons in DM or in the group).
onboarding.needLanguageRulesGroupShort: First choose your language and accept the community rules (buttons in DM or in the group).

dm.cannotWriteOpenStart: I cannot DM you. Open a chat with me, tap Start, then tap “Bot chat” in the group again.
dm.cannotWriteOpenStartShort: I cannot DM you. Open a chat with me, tap Start, and try again.
dm.noGroupsFound: No groups found. Add the bot to a group or tap “Bot chat” in the group you need.
dm.pickGroupHint: Pick the group to use for actions:

setup.hubHint: «{venues}» — venues, «{groupRules}» — rules text for new members, «{allBookings}» — view bookings in the group, «{recurringBookings}» — manage recurring bookings, «{linkExisting}» — link an existing venue, «{bookingWindow}» — when members can book, «{bookingLimit}» — per-user hours per weekday.
setup.dmSessionIntroParagraph: Group settings for «{title}». From now on, write only here — group members will not see these messages.
setup.step1NewResource:
Step 1/{stepMax}: How should the new venue be named in the bot?

Send one message with the name (non-empty, up to 200 characters).
setup.step1FromChatTitle:
Step 1/{stepMax}: How should this venue be named in the bot?
The Telegram chat title is «{chatTitle}»; you can replace it using the button below.

Send your name in a message or tap a button.
setup.step1RenameExisting:
Step 1/{stepMax}: How should this venue be named in the bot?
It is currently named «{existingName}» in the bot.

Send a new name in a message or tap «{keepBotName}» to leave the bot name unchanged.
setup.step2AddressWithCurrent:
Step 2/{stepMax}: venue address — shown in parentheses next to the name when picking.
Currently in the bot: «{current}».

Send a new address in a message, «{keepAddress}» or «{noAddress}» to remove the address.
setup.step2AddressEmpty:
Step 2/{stepMax}: venue address (optional — in parentheses next to the name).
No address is set yet.

Send a text message or tap «{noAddress}» to skip.
setup.wizardAlreadyOpen: Setup is already open — reply to the wizard above or tap {cancel}.
setup.adminOnly: Only an administrator can open settings.
setup.noLanguagesInDb: No languages found. Add rows to the languages table.
setup.pickNumberOrNew: Pick a number from the list or tap “{newResource}”.
setup.limitHoursPrompt: Pick a limit (hours per user on this day) or «{unlimited}»:
setup.whPerDayStartPrompt: {day}: choose slot start time (nearest allowed slot start).
setup.whPerDayEndPrompt: {day}: what end time should everything finish (opening: {hour}:00)?
setup.whPerDaySaved: Saved: {day} — slots from {start}:00. Pick another day or «{done}».
setup.continueInDmOnly: Continue setup in private messages with me — replies are not shown in the group.
setup.openSetupFailedFromGroup: Could not open settings. Try again from the group: /setup.
setup.openSetupFailedRetry: Could not open settings. Please try again.
setup.pickOptionFromList: Pick an option from the list.
setup.limitHoursLongIntro: Maximum booking hours per account on this weekday, per venue. Checks use the weekday and calendar start date in that venue’s time zone.
setup.persistSetupFailed: Could not save settings. Please try again.
setup.persistSetupFailedRetryGroup: Could not save settings. Run /setup in the group again.
setup.sportKindsTitle: Choose sports available on this venue (toggle buttons).
setup.sportKindsNeedOne: Select at least one sport for this venue.
setup.sessionStale: Your setup session expired. Run /setup in the group again.
setup.bwPickTzOrBack: Pick a time zone from the list or tap “{back}”.
setup.bwStep2StartInTz: Step 2/3: window start time (inclusive), in time zone «{tz}»:
setup.bwStep1TzWithCurrent:
Step 1/3: time zone for the booking window.

Current settings: {current}.

Pick a time zone:
setup.bwPickHourFromList: Pick a time from the list.
setup.bwStep3EndWithStart: Step 3/3: end of the window (end is exclusive): after this time bookings are not allowed. Window starts at: {hour}:00.
setup.bwEndMustAfterStartWithMidnight: The end must be after the start. Pick a later time or “{midnight}”.
setup.bwEndWindowAfterStart: The window end must be after the start.
setup.visibilityNoteInactive: Inactive — not shown in the booking list for regular members.
setup.visibilityNoteActive: Active — available for booking to everyone.
setup.doneAddedVenueActive: Done: venue «{name}» added (active). You can book in the group.
setup.perDayKeyboardHint:
{base}

At the bottom of the keyboard — “{whPerDay}” or “{whSkip}” (same hours for all days).
setup.bookingWindowWizardIntro:
Group booking hours

Current: {current}.

Members always see the menu, but they can create a new booking only during this interval (local time in the selected time zone).

Step 1/3: time zone for the window:
setup.limitWizardIntro:
Booking limit

How many hours one user can book per calendar day for each weekday (per venue). Weekday and date follow the venue time zone where the booking is made; one booking cannot exceed the limit for that day.

{summary}

Pick a weekday:
setup.recurringPickSport: Venue «{venue}». Pick a sport for the recurring booking:
setup.recurringPickWeekday: Pick a weekday for the recurring booking:
setup.recurringPickHalfHour: Pick time in HH:MM format with minutes 00 or 30.
setup.recurringPickEndDate: Enter end date in YYYY-MM-DD format (inclusive). Example: 2027-01-01.
setup.recurringOutsideWorkingHours: This recurring slot is outside the venue working hours for the selected weekday.
setup.recurringDuplicateRule: An identical recurring rule already exists.
setup.recurringOverlapRule: This recurring booking overlaps with an existing recurring rule.
setup.recurringEndDateInPast: End date cannot be in the past.
setup.recurringNoRulesForVenue: There are no recurring rules for venue «{venue}».
setup.recurringDeletePrompt: Pick a recurring rule to delete for venue «{venue}»:
setup.recurringDeletedPrompt: Recurring rule deleted. Pick another rule to delete for venue «{venue}»:
setup.recurringRuleAlreadyDeleted: Rule not found (it may have already been deleted).
setup.linkNoCandidates: No venues available to link. You only see resources from groups where you are an admin and which are not yet added to this group.
setup.linkPickPrompt: Pick a venue to link to this group:
setup.pickNumberOrBackButton: Pick a number from the list or tap “{back}”.
setup.pickNumberOrNewResource: Pick a number from the list or tap “{newResource}”.
setup.linkFailed: Could not link the venue. Check permissions and try again.
setup.linkDone: Done: venue «{name}» linked to the group.
setup.venuesPickIntro: Pick a venue or add a new one. Time zone, hours, and address are set per venue.
setup.deleteResourceNoPermission: Not enough rights to delete the venue.
setup.adminCancelBookingNoPermission: Not enough rights to cancel the booking.
setup.deleteUnlinkedResult: Venue «{name}» was unlinked from this group. All bookings and limits for it were removed here. Nothing changed in other groups where it is still linked.
setup.deleteFullRemovedResult: Venue «{name}» was fully removed (all bookings, links, and working hours).
setup.pickVenueOrAddAfterChange:
{done}

Pick a venue or add a new one.
setup.deleteNotLinkedOrRemoved: The venue is no longer linked to this group or was removed.
setup.deleteFailedTryLater: Could not delete the venue. Try again later.
setup.deleteConfirmBody1: All bookings for this venue in this group will be removed from the database without separate chat notifications.
setup.deleteConfirmBody2: If the venue is linked to other groups too, it will stay there; only the link and local bookings and limits are removed from your group.
setup.deleteConfirmBody3: If it exists only in your group, the venue record disappears completely (including the weekday schedule).
setup.step1NameNewResourceText: For a new venue, send the name as text (non-empty).
setup.step1NameFromChatNotForNew: For a new venue, send your own name as text, not the chat title.
setup.step1ChatTitleMissing: Could not read the chat title. Send the name as text.
setup.step1NameOrKeep: Send the name as text or tap “{keep}”.
setup.step1NameRequired: Send the venue name as text (non-empty).
setup.step1NameOrChatTitle: Send the venue name as text or tap “{useChatTitle}”.
setup.addressTextOrButton: Send the address in a text message or tap a button below.
setup.addressTextOrNoAddress: Send the address as text or tap “{noAddress}”.
setup.step3TzCaption: {stepLine}: time zone (slots will use this zone)
setup.rulesPickEditLanguage: Pick the language to edit rules for:
setup.rulesPickCreateLanguage: Pick the language to create or change rules for:
setup.rulesPickNumberOrBack: Pick a language number from the list or tap “{back}”.
setup.rulesEditReplace:
Rules language: {native} ({id}).

Current rules:

{rules}

Send new text in one message to replace the rules.
setup.rulesEditCreate:
Rules language: {native} ({id}).

Rules for this language are not set yet.

Send the rules text in one message to create them.
setup.rulesEmptyBody: Rules text cannot be empty. Send text in one message or tap “{back}”.
setup.rulesTooLong: Rules text is too long (maximum 12000 characters).
setup.rulesSaveFailed: Could not save the rules. Please try again.
setup.allBookingsEmptyToday: No bookings for today. Pick another day.
setup.allBookingsEmptyTomorrow: No bookings for tomorrow. Pick another day.
setup.allBookingsCanceledPickDay: Booking cancelled. There are no more active bookings for this day. Pick a day:
setup.allBookingsCanceledHeaderToday: Booking cancelled. All bookings for today:
setup.allBookingsCanceledHeaderTomorrow: Booking cancelled. All bookings for tomorrow:
setup.allBookingsNotFoundRefresh: Record not found or already cancelled. Pick “{today}” or “{tomorrow}” to refresh the list.
setup.visibilityCurrentInactive: inactive (hidden from regular members in booking)
setup.step6StatusAfterTz:
{stepLine}: venue status.

Currently in the bot: {current}.

Pick a status — next you will set hours per weekday:
setup.step6StatusWithHours:
{stepLine}: venue status.

Currently in the bot: {current}.

Pick a status — it will be saved together with hours and address:
setup.step5ClosingHours: {stepLine}: closing time — all bookings must end before the selected time (opening: {hour}:00)
setup.step4OpeningHours: {stepLine}: opening time — earliest allowed booking start
setup.endAfterStartPickOther: End time must be after start time. Pick another time.

freeSlot.gameFull: This game is full or the slot is no longer available.
freeSlot.listStale: The list was outdated and has been refreshed. Pick a slot again:
freeSlot.joinedNoMoreOpenings: You are on the roster. Game details were sent in a private message. There are no more open spots for this listing.
freeSlot.joinedSeeDmOrMenu: You are on the roster. When and where to meet — in a private message from me. You can pick another open spot or «Main menu»:

slotDm.peopleYou: From your side we count 1 person (you).
slotDm.peopleMany: From your side we count {n} people.
slotDm.peopleThemOne: From their side we count 1 person.
slotDm.peopleThemMany: From their side we count {n} people.
slotDm.addressUnknown: not specified — ask the organizer in the group

whDm.allDaysUnchanged: OK — all weekdays stay as saved.
whDm.noAdmin: You are not an administrator in this group.
whDm.pickWeekdayPreamble: Pick a weekday (Mon = Monday). Changes save immediately.
whDm.skipOrPerDayFirst: First tap «Skip» or «Set hours by weekday».
whDm.pickDayOrDone: Pick a day with a button or «Done — menu».
whDm.dayClosedSaved: Saved: closed day. Pick another day or «Done — menu».
whDm.dayRowHint: «Closed» — no slots. «Set hours» — same as in /setup.
whDm.tapBottomButton: Tap one of the buttons below.
whDm.pickOpeningByButtons: Pick opening time using the buttons (00:00–22:00).
whDm.pickEndByButtons: Pick end time using the buttons.
whDm.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time. Pick another time.
whDm.genericSaveFailedRetry: Could not save. Please try again.

grid.dayClosed: This day the venue is closed.

reminder.upcoming: Reminder: the game starts in 15 minutes! {place}, starts at {time}
